title: Prisons de femmes
writer: Francis Carco, Maurice Cloche, André Lebret
actors: Danièle Delorme, Jacques Duby, Vega Vinci
plot: Alice Rémon, a pharmacist, is a prostitute who managed to leave the streets by getting married. Her husband dies one day, poisoned. Her mother-in-law, who hates her, accuses her of murder.
